video_title: What's the BEST Flower Candle WAX? 9 Wax casts tests with silicone mold

windows.embed_text: a pink candle and a small white candle on a wooden table | a pink candle and a white candle on a wooden table | a pink liquid being poured into a cup | a cupcake with a red heart on it | a cup filled with liquid and a red heart
windows.old_description: Demoulding/flexing a pink silicone mould to release a wax disc/rose candle (wax test).
windows.embed_text_v2: Pouring molten pink coconut wax from a stainless steel pitcher into a round pink silicone pillar mold with a red dyed center, white EcoCoco wax pellets shown, wax test on paper towel
windows.summary_v2: Molten pink coconut wax is poured from a steel pitcher into a round pink silicone pillar mold around a red center as part of a wax test.

tags_v2.action: pouring molten wax into silicone mold
tags_v2.setting: overhead wood surface with paper towels
tags_v2.on_screen_text: Soap Fantasy Molds (watermark); WaxTest #4 EcoCoco Pillar (caption)

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of a round pink silicone pillar mold on a paper towel beside a pile of white EcoCoco coconut wax pellets on a wood surface; a 'Soap Fantasy Molds' watermark sits top-left and a 'WaxTest #4 EcoCoco Pillar' lower-third caption appears at center-right.
Same overhead layout, the pink silicone mold with its central wick hole at left and the heap of white wax pastilles at right on a lace-patterned paper towel; overlay graphics still shown.

Camera now angled on the mold; a stainless steel pouring pitcher tips over the pink mold and begins pouring molten pink wax into the round cavity, a red center showing where the wax pools around the core.
Molten pink wax streams from the metal pitcher into the silicone mold, filling around a bright red dyed center plug; the 'EcoCoco Pillar' caption sits along the bottom edge.
Pouring continues, the pink liquid wax spreading across the mold surface with the vivid red spot in the middle; pitcher held tilted above the mold.
More pink wax is poured in, the level rising in the round mold around the red center; steel pitcher still angled over it on the paper towel.
The pour fills the mold further, pink wax glossy across the top with the red core visible at the centre; pitcher nearly emptied above.
Final second: the mold is filled with pink wax, surface smooth and shiny with a red dot in the middle, pitcher lifting away as the pour finishes.
